target.title: Fix Workboard edit modal comments
target.body:
## Summary

- Show existing Workboard card comments in the edit modal.
- Add a small comment draft field that calls the existing `workboard.cards.comment` gateway method.
- Keep the patch scoped to the existing Workboard UI controller/view path, with no new i18n keys or generated locale churn.

Refs #88592.

## Verification

- `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts`
- `node --import tsx scripts/control-ui-i18n.ts check`
- `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`
- `git diff --check`

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: Opening a Workboard card edit modal now exposes existing comments and lets an operator add a comment from the same modal.
Real environment tested: Local Control UI unit test environment in the OpenClaw worktree.
Exact steps or command run after this patch: `node scripts/run-vitest.mjs ui/src/ui/views/workboard.test.ts`; `node --import tsx scripts/control-ui-i18n.ts check`; `pnpm tsgo:test:ui`; `git diff --check`.
Evidence after fix: The focused Workboard view test opens the edit modal, verifies an existing comment is visible, submits a new comment through `workboard.cards.comment`, and verifies local card state includes the new comment.
Observed result after fix: All listed commands passed; i18n check reported zero fallback keys.
What was not tested: Full browser/manual Control UI session and the separate drag/status behavior mentioned in #88592.
